top_signals.title: Treasury Market Signals Rates Need to Be Higher
top_signals.summary:
The $31 trillion Treasury market has an unequivocal message for Kevin Warsh’s Federal Reserve: Interest rates aren’t high enough. 
The reset upwards only intensified last week after the latest read on job growth topped all forecasts, reinforcing a growing conviction that rates need to rise in order to rein in inflation pressures and temper the risk of an AI-induced boom overheating the economy.
David Seif, Chief Economist for Developed Markets at Nomura, discusses his expectations for the Fed's path forward. (Source: Bloomberg)
top_signals.why_it_matters: Central-bank repricing affecting yields, FX, liquidity and equities.

top_signals.title: Bitcoin bottom? These four charts hint at BTC price dropping to $50K
top_signals.summary: A $50,000 Bitcoin price target remains in play despite BTC maintaining above $60,000 support for now, as multiple indicators warn the bottom may not be in.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Blockchain researchers warn HTX sanctions may blur crypto risk signals
top_signals.summary: Researchers say broad HTX tainting could freeze legitimate users and make compliance tools less useful for tracing illicit funds.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Schwab's Sonders Sees 'Red Flags,' Possible Inflationary Boom
top_signals.summary: Charles Schwab Chief Investment Strategist Liz Ann Sonders says markets may have become complacent about the economic impact of rising energy prices. Speaking with Vonnie Quinn on "Bloomberg Open Interest," Sonders says the economy is on the brink of a potential spike in oil prices and there's a big disconnect between the soft, survey-based economic data and the actual hard data. (Source: Bloomberg)
top_signals.why_it_matters: Commodity repricing impacting inflation expectations and industrial supply chains.

top_signals.title: Basque Region Sells €500 Million Bond for Industrial Policy
top_signals.summary: The Basque government raised €500 million ($577 million) in a sale of bonds to support the Spanish region’s industrial investment strategy.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: The space race is coming for pharma: Why drug development is heading to lower Earth orbit
top_signals.summary: Companies see a commercial opportunity in creating new ways to administer drugs to patients – in space.

top_signals.title: New Aave risk framework proposed following KelpDAO exploit
top_signals.summary: Aave founder Stani Kulechov said once the proposal passes the framework will be applied across all markets and assets.
